name: core.ac.uk
prose:
# CORE API v2 API

You can use the CORE API to access the resources harvested and enriched by CORE. If you encounter any problems with the API, please report them to us.

Overview

The API is organised by resource type. The resources are articles, journals and repositories and are represented using ## Getting started The CORE API v2 API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `http://core.ac.uk/api-v2`. ## Authentication Authenticate by passing your API key in the `apiKey` header on every request. ## API reference ### POST /articles/dedup Get all near duplicate articles ### POST /articles/get Batch operation for retrieving articles by CORE ID ### GET /articles/get/{coreId} Get article by CORE ID Returns a single record. ### GET /articles/get/{coreId}/download/pdf Get fulltext PDF by CORE ID Returns a single record. ### GET /articles/get/{coreId}/history Get article history by CORE ID Returns a list of records. Accepts query parameters: `page`, `pageSize`. Sample response: ```json { "data": [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] } ``` ### POST /articles/search Batch operation for search through articles ### GET /articles/search/{query} Search through all documents Returns a list of records. Accepts query parameters: `page`, `pageSize`, `metadata`, `fulltext`, `citations`, `similar`, `duplicate`, `urls`, `faithfulMetadata`. Sample response: ```json { "data": [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] } ``` ### POST /articles/similar Get articles by similarity to a text ### POST /journals/get Batch operation for retrieving journals by ISSN ### GET /journals/get/{issn} Find journal by ISSN Returns a single record. ### POST /journals/search Batch operation for search through journals ### GET /journals/search/{query} Search through journals Returns a list of records. Accepts query parameters: `page`, `pageSize`. Sample response: ```json { "data": [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] } ``` ### POST /repositories/get Batch operation for retrieving repositories by CORE repository ID ### GET /repositories/get/{repositoryId} Get repository by CORE repository ID Returns a single record. ### POST /repositories/search Batch operation for searching through repositories ### GET /repositories/search/{query} Search through all repositories Returns a list of records. Accepts query parameters: `page`, `pageSize`, `stats`, `depositHistory`, `depositHistoryCumulative`. Sample response: ```json { "data": [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] } ``` ### POST /search Batch operation for search through all resources ### GET /search/{query} Search through all resources Returns a list of records. Accepts query parameters: `page`, `pageSize`. Sample response: ```json { "data": [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] } ```
